'''''Skyhook''''' was an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] under the command of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] during the hunt for [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]] as part of Group Two.

==History==
It participated in the [[Battle of Vahaba]], defending [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Teren Rogriss]]'s ''[[Stellar Web]]'' along with Solo's other ''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer, ''[[Crynyd]]'', against [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s ''Imperial I''-class Star Destroyer, ''[[Red Gauntlet]]'', and ''[[Serpent's Smile]]'', Zsinj's [[Victory-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Victory''-class Star Destroyer]]. The attack failed due to mass fire and superior tactics on behalf of the temporarily allied [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], and ''[[Serpent's Smile]]'' was destroyed. ''Red Gauntlet'' surrendered shortly after, to the combined force of Solo's Star Destroyers, as well as ''[[Stellar Web]]''. She carried six squadrons of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] even after her capture by the New Republic.

{{Ship-stub}}
